description: Detect the structure of the archived file: encoding, sheets/tables, column names/types, row count, merged-cell regions. Produces a structure report for confirm_with_user to review. No mutation to DB or vault.

archived_path.description: Path produced by archive_original. Must live under vault/originals/.

sha256.description: Optional. Forwarded from archive_original for traceability.

hint_format.description: Optional format hint. Default 'auto' — detect from extension + magic bytes.

encoding.description: Detected text encoding (utf-8, cp950, big5, utf-8-sig, …). Required for csv/tsv; may be null for xlsx.

sheets.description: One entry per sheet/table. CSV/TSV produce a single-element array with name='__default__'.

sample_values.description: Up to 5 distinct non-null samples for human review.

merged_cell_ranges.description: Excel-style A1 ranges of merged regions, e.g. ['A2:A5','C10:D10']. Empty array for non-xlsx. Downstream must unmerge + ffill before matching (Excel merged-cell rule).

proposed_tables.description: Optional heuristic target table-name candidates (snake_case). These are suggestions only; final target-table choice belongs to Leader + confirm_with_user.

anomalies.description: Plain-text notes: 'column X has mixed int/text', 'sheet Y has merged cells in header row', etc. No judgment — just facts for the user.
